name: Phase3

components.description: Offsets the pitch of the oscillator

components.label: EOR
components.description: Triggers at the end of the rise of the envelope

components.label: EOF
components.description: Triggers at the end of the envelope

components.label: Ring
components.description: Ring modulates the internal oscillator and incoming signals

components.label: Mode
components.description:
Mode 1 is drone mode (envelope does not affect VCA)
Mode 2 is mono mode (envelope controls VCA)
Mode 3 is poly mode (4 voice)
